MOOYAH partners with Dude Perfect for Burger Battle Box, offering limited-time collaboration for ultimate family fun.
news.summary: In a one-of-a-kind partnership, MOOYAH Burgers, Fries & Shakes has joined forces with the popular family entertainment group Dude Perfect to introduce the exclusive 'Burger Battle Box.' This limited-time offer showcases a fusion of epic flavors, family enjoyment, and memorable experiences. Set to debut on March 7, 2025, in Plano, Texas, this collaboration is aimed at delivering unique moments. The Dude ‘Burger Battle Box’ is a must-try for those seeking a blend of culinary delight and entertainment.

Stock market plunges with Dow Jones dropping almost 400 points, as leading growth stocks like Waystar and Stride see sell signals. McDonald's and Verizon show bullish breakouts.
news.summary: Stock market witnessed heightened losses on Friday as several prominent growth stocks, such as Waystar and Stride, showed sell signals. The Dow Jones industrial average dropped by almost 400 points. Conversely, McDonald's and Verizon experienced positive breakouts, marking bullish movements in the market.

Analyst predicts growth for 4 Bitcoin stocks, citing high-performance computing as key factor. Cipher Mining price target set at $6.5, projected Q1 revenue of $47.78M and EPS loss of 10 cents. Hive Digital Technologies price target set at $6.
news.summary: Rosenblatt analyst Chris Brendler recently started coverage on Bitcoin stocks, foreseeing a premium for them due to their venture into the high-performance computing sector. He initiated coverage on Cipher Mining (NASDAQ:CIFR) with a Buy rating and a price target of $6.5. Despite a recent market decline, Brendler is optimistic about Cipher Mining's potential, with expectations of revenue at $47.78 million and an EPS loss of 10 cents for the first quarter. Additionally, Brendler started coverage on Hive Digital Technologies (NASDAQ:HIVE) with a Buy rating and a price target of $6. Hive Digital Technologies is seen as a promising player in the Bitcoin mining industry.

news.headline: Stock market avoids jobs report backlash; crypto reserves disappoint. German nuke potential. Jobs report: Nonfarm payrolls 151K (consensus 159K), nonfarm private payrolls 140K (consensus 145K), average hourly earnings 0.3% (consensus 0.3%).
news.summary: The article discusses the significance of the 200-day moving average in the stock market, highlighting its influence on investor behavior despite lacking analytical basis. It also mentions the oversold nature of the market based on the RSI indicator. The article emphasizes on the recent jobs report, which closely met expectations, with Nonfarm payrolls at 151K (vs.159K consensus), Nonfarm private payrolls at 140K (vs. 145K consensus), Average hourly earnings at 0.3% (vs. 0.3% consensus), and Average work week at 34.1 hours (vs. 34.2 hours). Wall Street's positioning around the jobs report is noted, with the potential for a significant market reaction to both stronger or weaker reports. Understanding these market mechanics can provide investors with an edge.

news.headline: Powell: Federal Reserve does not need to rush, can wait for greater clarity
Vantage Bank partners with Prelim to streamline onboarding using $4.4 billion Texas-based community bank.
news.summary: A company known for its innovative omnichannel onboarding solutions, Prelim, based in Silicon Valley, has revealed a key partnership with Vantage Bank, a community bank with assets totaling $4.4 billion in Texas. This collaboration will see Vantage Bank integrating Prelim’s advanced onboarding platform to simplify the account opening process for a wide range of clients, including consumers, small businesses, and commercial customers. By adopting this digital-first solution, Vantage Bank aims to modernize its operations by replacing its outdated legacy system.

news.headline: Fed's Powell: anticipate route to 2% inflation will remain uneven
Stocks down: Dow -0.65% at 42,302.29, Nasdaq -1.16% at 17,860.03, S&P 500 -0.90% at 5,686.92. Energy shares rose 1.6%.
news.summary: Midway through Friday's trading session, U.S. stocks saw a downturn, with the Nasdaq Composite declining by over 1%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped by 0.65% to 42,302.29, while the NASDAQ fell by 1.16% to 17,860.03. The S&P 500 also experienced a decrease, down by 0.90% to 5,686.92. Energy sector shares were among the top performers, rising by 1.6%, whereas financial sector shares decreased by 1.4%. The February jobs report from the Bureau of Labor and Statistics revealed that the U.S. economy added 151,000 jobs, surpassing the prior month's 125,000 but falling short of the expected 160,000. Unexpectedly, the unemployment rate climbed to 4.1%, higher than the anticipated 4.0%. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Jerome H. Powell, Fed Chair, maintains rate status quo amidst Trump policy unpredictability, prioritizing clarity over impulsive moves.
news.summary: Jerome H. Powell, the Federal Reserve Chairman, has emphasized the importance of distinguishing between true indications and irrelevant information. This statement comes amidst fluctuating decisions by the president regarding tariffs.

news.headline: BNP Paribas extends CEO Bonnafe's term until 2028, setting stage for long-term leadership.
Inventors from Ontario introduce HOLOGRAPHIC GAME STADIUM to enhance app style games, promising immersive experiences.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025 in Pittsburgh, two inventors from Ontario, California unveiled a new innovation called the Holographic Game Stadium. They aimed to revolutionize the concept of app-style games by creating a more immersive experience. The inventors expressed their desire to enhance entertainment levels while playing.

news.headline: Advanced Biomed Inc. closes US$6.56M IPO, selling 1.64M shares at $4.00 each on Nasdaq (ticker symbol ADVB).
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, in Tainan, Taiwan, Advanced Biomed Inc. confirmed the completion of its initial public offering on NASDAQ (ADVB). The biotech firm focused on cancer advancements finalized the offering of 1,640,000 common stock shares at a price of $4.00 per share. The total earnings amounted to $6.56 million before deductions for underwriting discounts and expenses. Trading of the Shares commenced on March 6, 2025, under the ticker symbol “ADVB” on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Bigbank releases audited 2024 Annual Report, financial results match unaudited report from 26 Feb.
news.summary: Bigbank's Management Board has finalized the audited Annual Report for 2024, finding no variations in financial results in comparison to the unaudited interim report released on 26 February.

NASA astronaut Don Pettit will answer STEM questions from Oregon students in a 20-minute broadcast from the International Space Station on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, students in Oregon will get the unique opportunity to interact with NASA astronaut Don Pettit as he responds to prerecorded questions related to science, technology, engineering, and mathematics from the International Space Station. The session will last for 20 minutes.

Nasdaq falls into correction, S&P 500 down 1%, Nasdaq 100 down 1.24%, worst weeks since Sept 2024, Nasdaq dropped over 10%.
news.summary: During midday trading on Friday, all three major indices were in the red, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 experiencing declines of 1% and 1.24%, respectively. These drops put them on track for their worst weeks since September 2024. The Nasdaq entered correction territory on Friday after plummeting over 10% below its peak in February. Market turmoil was largely attributed to tariff announcements and uncertainty throughout the week. President Donald Trump made headlines on Thursday by halting all tariffs on products governed by the North American trade agreement until April 2, but this had minimal impact on market volatility. The stock market has been highly reactive to tariff news, leading to heightened levels of volatility.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency price update: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, ADA, DOGE, PI, HBAR, LINK. Bitcoin struggles around $85,000-$90,000 range amid bull-bear clash.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin is currently attempting to establish a higher low around $85,000 after facing strong resistance at $90,000. This indicates a challenging struggle between buyers and sellers as the cryptocurrency market tries to push past key resistance levels.

news.headline: Canada launching C$5 bln trade impact program to help canadian exporters reach new markets in response to US tariffs - government statement
Canada will make C$1 bln in new financing available through farm credit program to help farmers address cash flow problems - government statement
